Bash(git add src/app/admin/login src/app/admin/my-ip src/app/api/admin src/app/auth/verify-admin src/app/auth/callback src/app/layout.tsx src/app/global-error.tsx)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Security: Complete production security improvements

This commit implements comprehensive security improvements for production readiness.

## Critical Security Fixes:
- OAuth admin access now requires password verification
- Service role key protected by multi-layer authentication
- Admin email moved to server-side \(no longer exposed to client\)
- Profiles RLS policies tightened \(no more "view all profiles"\)

## New Security Features:
- CSRF protection with token generation/validation
- Rate limiting on admin endpoints \(5-10 req/15min\)
- reCAPTCHA v3 for brute-force protection \(after 3 failed attempts\)
- Optional IP whitelisting for admin access \(CIDR/wildcard support\)
- Comprehensive security headers \(HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, etc.\)

## Error Tracking:
- Complete Sentry integration \(server, client, edge\)
- Error boundary with user context
- Source map upload with tunnel route
- Helper utilities for error tracking

## Additional Improvements:
- Fixed translation language defaults \(Hebrew/Arabic\)
- Fixed student logout redirect \(now goes to main page\)
- Created utility page for IP detection \(/admin/my-ip\)
- Updated .env.example with all required variables

## Files Added:
- src/lib/admin.ts - Server-side admin validation
- src/lib/captcha.ts - reCAPTCHA utilities
- src/lib/csrf.ts - CSRF token management
- src/lib/ip-whitelist.ts - IP whitelist validation
- src/lib/sentry.ts - Error tracking helpers
- src/middleware.ts - CSRF/security headers
- src/app/auth/verify-admin/page.tsx - OAuth password verification
- src/app/admin/my-ip/page.tsx - IP detection utility
- src/app/api/admin/validate-email/route.ts - Server-side email check
- src/app/api/admin/verify-password/route.ts - Protected password verification
- src/components/Recaptcha.tsx - reCAPTCHA component
- src/components/SentryProvider.tsx - User context for Sentry
- src/components/SentryErrorBoundary.tsx - React error boundary
- sentry.*.config.ts - Sentry runtime configs
- instrumentation.ts - Sentry registration hook
- supabase/migrations/20260309_tighten_profiles_rls.sql - RLS policy update
- PRODUCTION_SECURITY.md - Complete security documentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix: Critical production issues

1. CSRF Fix - Exempt OAuth callback from CSRF checks
   - OAuth callback to setup-profile was being blocked
   - Added /api/admin/setup-profile to exempt routes

2. RLS Fix - Remove circular reference in admin policy
   - Admin policy was querying profiles inside profiles policy
   - Simplified to direct subquery check

3. UX Fix - Add autocomplete attribute to email input
   - Suppresses browser accessibility warning

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix: Sync admin OAuth session to default Supabase client

Admin Google OAuth login was failing because the session was stored in
supabaseAdmin \(storage key: band2-admin-auth\) but AuthContext uses the
default supabase client \(supabaseTeacher with storage key: band2-teacher-auth\).

The fix syncs the session to both clients after successful OAuth so that
AuthContext and useAuth\(\) can properly detect the logged-in admin user.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
